schema.title: Response Get Stats Api V1 Search Stats Get

post.description:
Return unique organizations (buyers and suppliers) linked to the given cte_ids
via contract_items → contracts → organizations.

post.summary: Search similar CTEs by name and return contracts
post.description:
1. Embed the query via Ollama
2. Search Qdrant for top N similar CTEs
3. Find all contracts for those CTEs
4. Filter by date, region, INN
5. Return matched CTEs + contracts with unit prices

get.summary: Calculate НМЦК via vector search + contracts

parameters.name: top_n

schema.description: Number of similar CTEs from Qdrant
schema.title: Top N

parameters.description: Number of similar CTEs from Qdrant

post.description:
User provides their own contracts with prices for a given cte_id.
НМЦК is computed purely from those prices.

post.summary: Save user-provided contracts to the database
post.description: Save an array of manually entered contracts for a given cte_id.
